stemHtml: The use of ailerons induces adverse (aileron) yaw. This occurs as a result of the...

options.a: up-going wing producing more drag than the down-going wing.
options.b: up-going wing having a higher rate of roll when compared to the down-going wing.
options.c: down-going wing producing more drag than the up-going wing.
options.d: up-going wing being subjected to more aerodynamic damping than the down-going wing.
